---
Test
---
!1 Member
Member is a record type with settings for DiVA client for each member in the DiVA consortium.

!2 Member
There is only one validation type for member.

!*< Setup record type definition

!define recordTypeId {diva-member}
!define recordTypeDefinition {!-diva-member (group)
	recordInfo (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
		id (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint, I)
		type {diva-member} (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		validationType {diva-member} (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		dataDivider {diva} (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		createdBy (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		permissionUnit (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		tsCreated (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		updated (group, 1-X, noConstraint)
			updatedBy (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
			tsUpdated (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	memberPermissionUnit (recordLink, 0-1, write)
	hostname (textVariable, 1-X, write, P)
	loginUnit (recordLink, 1-X, write)
	backgroundColor (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	textColor (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	backgroundColorDarkMode (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
	textColorDarkMode (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
	logoSvg (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	pageTitleSv (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	pageTitleEn (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	hero (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
		title (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{swe} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{eng} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		subTitle (group, 0-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{swe} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{eng} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		imageUrl (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		imageAttribution (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
			title (group, 0-1, noConstraint)
				text lang:{swe} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
				text lang:{eng} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			author (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
			source (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
				url (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
				displayLabel (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			license (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
				url (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
				displayLabel (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	link visibility:{public, admin, all}, lang:{swe, eng} (group, 0-X, noConstraint)
		url (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		displayLabel (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)-!}

#idSource (userSupplied/timestamp/sequence) others true/false
!define recordTypeIdSource {userSupplied}
!define recordTypeIsPublic {true}
!define recordTypeUsePermissionUnit {true}
!define recordTypeUseVisibility {false}
!define recordTypeUseTrashBin {false}
!define recordTypeStoreInArchive {false}

*!
!include -seamless .HelperPages.checkRecordType

!*< Setup validation type definition

!define validationTypeId {diva-member}
!define recordTypeId {diva-member}
!define createValidationTypeDefinition {!-diva-member (group)
	recordInfo (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
		id (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		dataDivider {diva} (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		validationType {diva-member} (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		permissionUnit (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
	memberPermissionUnit (recordLink, 0-1, noConstraint)
	hostname (textVariable, 1-X, noConstraint)
	loginUnit (recordLink, 1-X, noConstraint)
	backgroundColor (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	textColor (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	backgroundColorDarkMode (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
	textColorDarkMode (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
	logoSvg (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	pageTitleSv (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	pageTitleEn (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	hero (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
		title (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{swe} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{eng} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		subTitle (group, 0-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{swe} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{eng} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		imageUrl (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		imageAttribution (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
			title (group, 0-1, noConstraint)
				text lang:{swe} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
				text lang:{eng} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			author (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
			source (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
				url (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
				displayLabel (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			license (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
				url (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
				displayLabel (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	link visibility:{public, admin, all}, lang:{swe, eng} (group, 0-X, noConstraint)
		url (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		displayLabel (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)-!}
	
!define updateValidationTypeDefinition {!-diva-member (group)
	recordInfo (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
		id (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint, I)
		type {diva-member} (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		validationType {diva-member} (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		dataDivider {diva} (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		createdBy (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		permissionUnit (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
		tsCreated (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		updated (group, 1-X, noConstraint)
			updatedBy (recordLink, 1-1, noConstraint)
			tsUpdated (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	memberPermissionUnit (recordLink, 0-1, write)
	hostname (textVariable, 1-X, write, P)
	loginUnit (recordLink, 1-X, write)
	backgroundColor (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	textColor (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	backgroundColorDarkMode (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
	textColorDarkMode (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
	logoSvg (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	pageTitleSv (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	pageTitleEn (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	hero (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
		title (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{swe} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{eng} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		subTitle (group, 0-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{swe} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			text lang:{eng} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		imageUrl (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		imageAttribution (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
			title (group, 0-1, noConstraint)
				text lang:{swe} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
				text lang:{eng} (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			author (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
			source (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
				url (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
				displayLabel (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
			license (group, 1-1, noConstraint)
				url (textVariable, 0-1, noConstraint)
				displayLabel (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
	link visibility:{public, admin, all}, lang:{swe, eng} (group, 0-X, noConstraint)
		url (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)
		displayLabel (textVariable, 1-1, noConstraint)-!}

*!
!include -seamless .HelperPages.checkValidationType

----
